completed_tasks.name: Fix deploy/frontend/fly.toml dockerfile path
completed_tasks.note: Edited but NOT yet committed. dockerfile = "deploy/frontend/Dockerfile" → "Dockerfile" (resolved relative to toml dir). Same bug class as commits bca06a6 (db) and fdd8fd4 (backend).

completed_tasks.name: Deploy road-quality-frontend to Fly.io
completed_tasks.note: flyctl deploy --remote-only --config deploy/frontend/fly.toml --app road-quality-frontend . from repo root. 2 machines (6e826612fdd168, 91854460a3d978) in lax, both started. https://road-quality-frontend.fly.dev/ serves index.html (200, 405 bytes).

completed_tasks.name: Bootstrap topology (seed data)
completed_tasks.progress: seed_data.py inserted 209,856 road_segments + 125,632 segment_defects + 209,856 segment_scores via flyctl proxy on 15432. Then crashed during pgr_createTopology call. pgr_createTopology has NOT been run successfully — road_segments_vertices_pgr table does not exist.

remaining_tasks.name: Run pgr_createTopology directly on db machine
remaining_tasks.command: flyctl ssh console -a road-quality-db -C "psql -U rq -d roadquality -c \"SELECT pgr_createTopology('road_segments', 0.0001, 'geom', 'id', clean := true);\""
remaining_tasks.expected_outcome: creates road_segments_vertices_pgr with ~50k-75k rows; populates source/target columns on road_segments

remaining_tasks.name: UAT #1: First production deploy from main via GH Actions
remaining_tasks.blocker: needs master→main branch rename, push to GitHub, gh secrets FLY_API_TOKEN + PG_PASSWORD

remaining_tasks.name: UAT #3: Live CORS preflight from deployed frontend
remaining_tasks.blocker: needs browser DevTools at https://road-quality-frontend.fly.dev/ — click Find Best Route → sign in → observe OPTIONS /route

remaining_tasks.name: UAT #5: VITE_API_URL bundle inspection (no localhost)
remaining_tasks.command: flyctl ssh console -a road-quality-frontend -C 'grep -r road-quality-backend.fly.dev /usr/share/nginx/html/assets/ | head -3'

blockers.description: pgr_createTopology was canceled at pause (was running via flyctl ssh, not yet complete)
blockers.workaround: Re-run cleanly via flyctl ssh; clean := true makes it idempotent. DB is now sized correctly (2GB RAM, 5GB volume) so it should complete this time.

human_actions_pending.context: Requires opening https://road-quality-frontend.fly.dev/ in a browser with DevTools
Rename master→main, set gh secrets FLY_API_TOKEN + PG_PASSWORD, push to trigger deploy.yml

decisions.rationale: Recovery from OOM-killed pgr_createTopology was crash-looping
Disk-full was the actual root cause of recovery crash loop ('No space left on device' writing pg_wal/xlogtemp). 1GB volume was too small to hold seeded data + WAL.

decisions.decision: Cancel in-flight pgr_createTopology cleanly at pause
decisions.rationale: clean := true makes the function idempotent; safer to re-run from a fresh session than to leave an SSH-session-tied query that may die when terminal closes

road-quality-db.data: 209,856 road_segments + 125,632 segment_defects + 209,856 segment_scores. Missing: road_segments_vertices_pgr (pgr_createTopology never completed).

road-quality-frontend.verified: GET / returns 200 with index.html (405 bytes); references hashed assets and Vite-built bundle

next_action: 1) Commit deploy/frontend/fly.toml dockerfile path fix. 2) Run pgr_createTopology DIRECTLY via flyctl ssh (NOT through proxy — the proxy was the original failure trigger). 3) Verify vertex count > 0. 4) Walk through UAT #4 + #5 (curl-based, can be done end-to-end). 5) Offer UAT #1 + #3 to user (need their hands).
context_notes: Phase 5 was already 'shipped' at artifact level (PROJECT.md treats it as ✓ with 9/9 SCs verified at code level), but the live-deploy operator runbook (05-HUMAN-UAT.md) was paused mid-walkthrough on 2026-04-27 at 78% context. This session resumed it. Frontend deploy succeeded on first try after the toml path fix. Topology bootstrap hit two undocumented infra capacity issues (memory + volume) that should be folded into Phase 5 RESEARCH/CONTEXT or a Phase 5.1 polish plan. CRITICAL: pgr_createTopology MUST run via flyctl ssh, NOT through flyctl proxy — the proxy timed out on the long query, postgres rolled back, and that triggered the OOM/disk-full crash loop that ate ~30 min.
